name: Sunshine Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the liquid ingredients (lemon juice and orange juice) and spices (minced garlic, dried oregano, and crushed red pepper). Mix well to create a marinade.
2. Add the chicken bouillon granules to the marinade and stir until dissolved.
3. Place all of the chicken pieces into the zippered storage bag and pour in the marinade.
4. Seal the bag tightly and turn off any sharp objects that might puncture it.
5. Refrigerate the bagged chicken for at least 2 hours, allowing the flavors to meld and the chicken to marinate.
6. After marinating, carefully drain the chicken from the liquid and discard the remaining marinade.
7. Grill, bake, broil, or sauté the chicken as desired until it reaches a safe internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
8. Store any leftovers in an airtight container and refrigerate immediately.
